senses.name: Infrared Vision
senses.description: See heat signatures through barriers up to 10cm thick

senses.name: Darkvision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see clearly in complete darkness

senses.name: Enhanced Hearing
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to hear beyond normal frequency/distance

senses.name: Scent Enhancement
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to identify individuals/substances by smell

senses.name: Tactile Sensitivity
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect minute textures/vibrations/temperature

senses.name: Magnetic Sense
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to determine directions and detect metal

senses.name: Lie Detection
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect deliberate lies

senses.name: Scent Tracking
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to follow trails by scent

senses.name: Echolocation
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to navigate in darkness using sound, range Tier×10 Sp

senses.name: Thermal Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see heat signatures through walls

senses.name: Microscopic Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see cellular-level detail

senses.name: Tremor Sense
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect movement through vibrations, range Tier×5 Sp

senses.name: Aura Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive emotional states and supernatural auras

senses.name: Time Sense
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive temporal distortions

senses.name: Precognitive Flashes
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to glimpse potential outcomes of immediate actions

senses.name: X-Ray Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see through solid objects up to Tier×2 Sp thick

senses.name: Psychic Resonance
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to detect psychic activity and mental powers

senses.name: Dimensional Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see into adjacent dimensions

senses.name: Life Detection
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to sense all living creatures within Tier×100 Sp

senses.name: Energy Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see all forms of energy as visible spectrums

senses.name: Omniscient Sight
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive events anywhere on Earth you can visualize

senses.name: Temporal Vision
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to see past or future states with perfect clarity

senses.name: Quantum Perception
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive probability clouds and quantum states

senses.name: Universal Detection
senses.description: Make Awareness checks to sense any phenomenon within city-sized area

senses.name: Unique Sense
senses.description: Supernatural sense for specific phenomenon, cost based on scope
